name: Maple Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Fresh cranberries (1 bag), well washed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cranberries, maple syrup, juice, and orange zest in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Lower the heat to medium and cook for about 10 minutes or until the cranberries pop open.
4. Carefully skim off any foam that forms on the surface.
5. Stir in the walnuts.
6. Cool and refrigerate until ready to use.
7. The recipe may be doubled and made up to a day ahead.
